scripts.preflight: node -e "const fs=require('fs');if(!fs.existsSync('node_modules')){console.error('Dependencies not installed. Run: npm install');process.exit(1)}console.log('✓ Dependencies OK')"
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run build
scripts.dev: npx concurrently --raw --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:server"
scripts.dev:server: cd server && npx tsx watch src/index.ts
scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix client && npm run lint --prefix server
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix client && npm run test --prefix server
scripts.type-check: npx tsc --noEmit --prefix client && npx tsc --noEmit --prefix server
